title: Detect and alert when agents stop work with open tasks
description: Agents sometimes abandon work sessions while open beads/tasks remain uncompleted. Need a mechanism to detect this — e.g. monitor agent heartbeats + cross-reference with claimed/in-progress beads across all projects. When an agent goes idle (no heartbeat or session activity for >N minutes) but has open claimed tasks, alert jkh. Could be a heartbeat check, a cron job, or built into ACC server.

title: T11: idle agent detection
description: In dispatch tick, implement detect_idle_agents(). An agent is idle when: online (lastSeen <300s), online for >= ACC_IDLE_GRACE_PERIOD seconds, has 0 tasks with status in (claimed,in_progress), AND no open non-discovery/non-idea tasks exist that the agent is capable of claiming. Returns list of idle agent names.

title: T12: discovery task auto-creation for idle agents
description: For each idle agent from T11: skip if agent already has an open discovery task. Find projects with zero open idea tasks, sorted by oldest last-activity. If no such project, skip. Create discovery task (priority=4, status=claimed, claimed_by=<agent>, metadata.auto_created=true). Publish tasks:dispatch_assigned to agent on bus.

title: T10: Rocky response handler and expiry timeout
description: Subscribe dispatch loop to bus broadcast receiver for rocky:human_response messages. Handle actions: extend_7d (advance expiry +7d), promote_anyway (force-promote bypassing vote count), let_expire (mark rejected). Also: on each tick expire ideas where effective expiry < now AND rocky_warn_sent_at < now - ACC_ROCKY_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT.

title: T9: Rocky pre-expiry warning via bus
description: In dispatch tick, call check_idea_expiry(). For open idea tasks where created_at < now - (ACC_IDEA_VOTE_EXPIRY - ACC_IDEA_EXPIRY_WARN_BEFORE) and metadata.expiry_warned != true: set metadata.expiry_warned=true and rocky_warn_sent_at=now, publish rocky:ask_human on bus_tx with idea summary and action choices: extend_7d, promote_anyway, let_expire.

title: T8: idea tally, promotion, and rejection
description: In dispatch tick, call tally_idea_votes(). Count approve votes with non-empty refinements. If >= ACC_IDEA_APPROVE_THRESHOLD: create new work task with merged refinements appended, set metadata.promoted_from, mark idea status=completed. If rejections >= ACC_IDEA_REJECT_THRESHOLD: mark idea status=rejected. Publish tasks:added for promoted work task.

title: T7: vote nudges in dispatch loop
description: In dispatch tick, scan open idea tasks with < ACC_IDEA_APPROVE_THRESHOLD approvals. For each, collect online agents who have not yet voted and are not the creator. Publish tasks:dispatch_nudge with to:<agent> per eligible agent. Rate-limit to once per tick per idea per agent.

title: T6: PUT /api/tasks/:id/vote endpoint
description: Add vote endpoint to routes/tasks.rs. Validate: task exists, task_type=idea, refinement non-empty, agent != metadata.created_by. Upsert into metadata.votes array. Return updated task. Also patch create_task to set metadata.created_by=agent when task_type=idea. Routes: PUT /api/tasks/:id/vote.

title: T5: tick loop — broadcast nudge, explicit assign, backfill
description: Implement full dispatch tick body: (1) Backfill — tasks older than ACC_DISPATCH_BACKFILL_THRESHOLD go straight to explicit assignment. (2) Broadcast nudge at 30s — publish tasks:dispatch_nudge to:null, update metadata.dispatch.last_nudge_at. (3) Explicit assign at 90s — atomic SQL claim for best agent, publish tasks:dispatch_assigned. Respect blocked_by and max assign attempts. Store dispatch state in metadata.dispatch JSON.

title: T4: agent wakes poll loop on bus nudge
description: In agent/acc-agent/src/tasks.rs, spawn background task subscribing to agentbus SSE /bus/stream. On tasks:dispatch_nudge where to matches own name or to is null, signal main poll loop via tokio::sync::Notify to run immediately. Also wake on tasks:dispatch_assigned. Reconnect after 5s on SSE disconnect. Ignore nudge if at capacity.

title: T3: directed nudge on task create
description: In routes/tasks.rs create_task, after tasks:added bus publish, call dispatch::nudge_task(). Helper calls select_best_agent, publishes tasks:dispatch_nudge with to:<agent-name> if capable agent online, else to:null broadcast. Existing tasks:added message must still fire.

title: T2: capability matcher pure functions + unit tests
description: Implement select_best_agent(task, agents, claimed_counts) -> Option<String> in dispatch.rs as a pure function. Filter online agents by capability match, score by load, break ties alphabetically. Unit tests: no requirement, specific executor, least loaded, tiebreak, no eligible agents, blacklisted agent excluded.

title: T1: dispatch.rs skeleton + tokio::spawn in main.rs
description: Create acc-server/src/dispatch.rs with pub async fn run(state: Arc<AppState>) tick loop. Wire into main.rs via tokio::spawn. Read all ACC_DISPATCH_* env vars with defaults. ACC_DISPATCH_ENABLED=false exits loop immediately. Expose pub mod dispatch in lib.rs.

title: agents: register ssh_user/ssh_host/ssh_port in heartbeat
description: Agents must register their full SSH connection details (user, host, port) on every heartbeat so the hub registry is the authoritative source for reaching any agent. Currently only host is registered; username and port are unknown, causing guesswork (e.g. Boris uses 'horde' not 'jkh', port 26510 not 22). Add AGENT_SSH_USER/AGENT_SSH_HOST/AGENT_SSH_PORT to each agent .env, include in heartbeat payload across queue-worker.py/agent-pull.sh/acc-agent, and add to hub telemetry_keys allowlist.
close_reason: ssh_user/ssh_host/ssh_port added to all heartbeat senders and hub allowlist; AGENT_SSH_* written to each agent's .env

title: acc-server: add migration for fleet_tasks.phase column
description: acc-server panics on startup with 'no such column: phase' when trying to create idx_fleet_tasks_phase index. The fleet_tasks table predates the phase column. Need a proper schema migration so fresh and existing deployments both work without manual sqlite intervention.
close_reason: Fixed: removed idx_fleet_tasks_phase from init_schema, reordered migrations v<2→v<3→v<4, phase index now created idempotently in v4 migration

title: Test: external contributor issue [gh:jordanhubbard/ACC#12]
description: This is a test issue to verify the two-way sync pipeline. An external contributor opened this.
